data.body:
GAP_ANALYSIS_AMENDMENT: Terminal signal behavior + canonical string requirements.

AC9: REPLAN_ESCALATE is a terminal signal (no further tasks emitted after it)
After emitting REPLAN_ESCALATE, SKILL.md must instruct implementation-plan to STOP all task decomposition immediately. It must NOT proceed to STATUS:complete or STATUS:blocked. The signal is the final output.
Verify: grep -A5 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'stop\|halt\|do not proceed\|final output' && echo PASS

AC10: Implementation uses canonical signal prefix matching contract fa7b-d4e9
The SKILL.md emission text must use exactly 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:' as the signal prefix (space after colon, space before EXPLANATION).
Verify: grep 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md && echo PASS

Source: Gap analysis finding 2 (implicit_assumption: canonical string alignment) and finding 3 (missing_error_path: terminal signal behavior)
